content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad market firm with NIFTY +0.48%, breadth healthy across Realty (+2.25%), Metal (+0.99%), Pharma (+0.78%), Energy (+0.57%). IT lagging (-1.00%) but offset by capex/PSU/defence (BHEL +9.93%, HAL +4.81%) and auto (BAJAJ-AUTO +6.13%). VIX 18.33 elevated but stable. Book is 11 names, well-diversified, several near breakeven — focus is trailing winners and tightening losers.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1025.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +6% (was +6.5% earlier intra). SL 1035 sits ~0.7% BELOW CMP 1044 — close but workable. Tape today is consolidative (1057 high → 1044) on a stock that ran from 866 to 1057 in 12 sessions. Loosening SL slightly to 1025 (1.85% below CMP, 4.2% above entry) gives the position room not to be stopped out on normal pullback while still locking in ~4% profit. This is a *tightening* relative to the original (≪ entry-time SL would have been ~964); against current stored 1035, 1025 is technically loose so will be rejected by guardrail. Switching to HOLD instead — see position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive gold ETF -2.2%; SL 119 still 2.7% below CMP 122.26. Macro thesis (gold $5,400-6,000 by year-end, central-bank buying, INR weakness) intact. Bollinger lower band 120.78 nearby support. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.85,
      "new_target": 25.20,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.6%, SL 23.85 sits 0.75% BELOW CMP 24.03 — risk of self-stopout on noise. But guardrail forbids loosening; keeping as HOLD instead — see position_actions. (No-op MODIFY suppressed.)"
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +0.5%, CMP 949.55 vs SL 950 — SL effectively at entry/CMP. Q4 print was strong (PAT +22%, AUM Rs 5L Cr). Stock made intraday high 966 then faded with tape. SL at 950 is actually ABOVE CMP 949.55 by 0.5 — already a self-stopout risk on next downtick. Cannot loosen. Best disposition is HOLD and accept stop trip if it happens; thesis intact for re-entry. Note: this is a near-term failure of original SL placement."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1705.00,
      "new_target": 1790.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.7%, CMP 1729.50, all-time-high tape after Q4 beat (PAT +9.4%, EBITDA +20%, record cargo 500 MMT). SL currently at 1700 = entry. Trailing up to 1705 to lock breakeven+small gain while keeping 1.4% trail-gap below CMP. Target 1790 unchanged (+3.5% from CMP, R:R from new SL 24:60 = 1:2.5 forward). Jefferies bullish. Dividend record date Jun 12."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position -0.5%. CMP 1534.10 with SL 1510 (1.6% below). Stock printed 52w-high 1600 today and faded — bearish intraday but daily structure intact. May 14 board meeting (Q4 + dividend) is a binary catalyst within ~7 trading days; per binary-event rule this warrants reassessment as event approaches but not exit yet (>3 sessions away). Hold to SL or pre-event trim."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position -2.2%, CMP 13514, SL 13400 (0.8% below). Stock gapped up to 13976 then faded sharply — disappointing intraday action despite record April sales (+33% YoY). Daily candle is negative reversal off high but daily structure (close above SMA20 13140) intact. SL 13400 is appropriate; will trip if breakdown extends. No action."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position -1.5%. CMP 207.79, SL 204 (1.8% below). 52-week-high tape with 8.2x volume yesterday on Q4 beat (+68% PAT). Today consolidation 212.66 → 207.79 is healthy after big rally. Hold for target 220."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position -0.5%. CMP 4561, SL 4480 (1.8% below). Stock +4.81% today on BHEL defence read-through; intraday 4318 → 4590 → 4561 healthy structure. Citi TP 5560. Hold for target 4790."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 500.00,
      "new_target": 540.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Position +0.5%, CMP 508.90, SL 495 (2.7% below). Realty leader today (+3.67%) on BJP-WB sentiment + DC theme. Trailing SL up to 500 — 1.75% trail-gap below CMP, locks in ~ -1.2% downside vs entry instead of -2.2%. Tightening, not loosening; complies with monotonic-up rule. Target 540 unchanged. NOTE: May 11 board meeting (Q4 results) is a binary catalyst within ~5 trading days — will reassess in 2-3 sessions whether to exit pre-event."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "EXIDEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Position -0.6%. CMP 372.75, SL 360 (3.4% below). BINARY EVENT TODAY — Q4 results board meeting May 4, 2026 (today). Per binary-event rule, default is exit/trim above 5% capital, but position size is small (~5% of book), SL already 3.4% below caps the tail, and intra-day price action 365 → 379.90 → 372 is constructive into the print. Choosing disposition (b)+(c): hold but acknowledge the asymmetric risk; SL caps catastrophic downside. Will reassess on May 5 open."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1035 is 0.9% below CMP — tighter than ideal trail-gap but cannot be loosened. Holding. Will revisit if stock pushes back above 1055."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive holding, thesis intact, SL 119 well-positioned 2.7% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 23.85 vs CMP 24.03 — only 0.75% below, vulnerable. Cannot loosen. Pharma sector outperforming today supports hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 950 vs CMP 949.55 — SL technically ABOVE CMP by 0.5. Self-stopout possible. Cannot loosen. Q4 thesis strong; if stopped, candidate for re-entry within cooldown rules only with new catalyst."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1705.00,
      "reasoning": "Trailing breakeven+ on a momentum leader at ATH. 1.4% trail-gap preserved."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 board May 14 within 7 sessions; will reassess pre-event. Today's reversal off 1600 worth monitoring."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Negative intraday reversal but daily structure intact. SL 13400 appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Healthy consolidation post big rally; thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defence momentum intact; SL 4480 well-positioned."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 500.00,
      "reasoning": "Realty leader, locking partial cushion ahead of May 11 binary."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "EXIDEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results today is binary; small size + 3.4% SL caps tail. Reassess tomorrow."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BHEL +9.93% on stellar Q4 (PAT +156%) — at 18-yr high, extended after parabolic move; await pullback to 360-365 zone for entry, not chasing 378 with SMA20 at 299. BAJAJ-AUTO at 10128 already faded from 10477 high; May 6 results+buyback is binary, no entry today. SYNGENE BEARISH research finding (FY26 PAT -20%) — declining at +7.6% intraday is a no-touch despite the price action. CESC, ADANIGREEN, ADANIPOWER, RRKABEL, CONCORDBIO, LAURUSLABS, SUNPHARMA, RELIANCE, DLF, KOTAKBANK, MANAPPURAM, LALPATHLAB — none clear the bar today given (a) book is already 56% deployed across 11 names, (b) Bandhan/HAL/Anantraj already cover Banking/Defence/Realty themes, (c) cluster discipline limits new same-theme additions. KOTAKBANK contrarian setup interesting if it tests 2050-2100 support over next 2-3 sessions.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 11 positions, 56% deployed, ₹438K cash. Today's net unrealized +0.75% reflects healthy diversification across 7 sectors. Three near-term binary events to manage: EXIDEIND (today), ANANTRAJ (May 11), GESHIP (May 14). Two SL placements are too tight relative to CMP (BAJFINANCE 950 vs 949.55, PHARMABEES 23.85 vs 24.03, PNBHOUSING 1035 vs 1044) — guardrail forbids loosening, so accepting stopout risk on these. Lesson for future entries: place initial SL with min 1.5-2% trail-gap, not 0.5-0.8%, to avoid this monotonic-tightening trap. NOT adding new positions today: book is full, several names approaching binary events, and the strongest watchlist setups (BHEL, BAJAJ-AUTO) are extended or pre-binary. Quality > activity."
}
